[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• current changes and find issues[31;3H[22m/rename[31;18H[2mrename the current thread[32;3H[22m/new[32;18H[2mstart a new chat during a conversation[33;3H[22m/resume[33;18H[2mresume a saved chat[39m[49m[0m[?25h[24;4H[?2026l[?2026h[22;1H[J[22;2H[0m[49m[K[23;2H[0m[48;2;38;38;38m[K[24;5H[0m[48;2;38;38;38m[K[25;2H[0m[48;2;38;38;38m[K[26;46H[0m[49m[K[27;28H[0m[49m[K[23;1H[39;48;2;38;38;38m
